message:
fix(sync): promote nested path dependencies to enclosing Cargo workspace root

When building the runtime sync plan, package roots inside a Cargo workspace
were synced individually, missing the workspace-level Cargo.toml and
Cargo.lock that remote builds need for inherited keys (edition.workspace,
version.workspace, etc.). Now checks if a package root lives inside a known
workspace and promotes the sync root accordingly, with BTreeSet dedup to
avoid syncing the same workspace twice.

Closes #8

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
